content:

## Task / Request
Hello Tywin, Masterbot has requested that I speak with you. What can I do for you?
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Context (Recent conversation from sender — read this to understand the full situation)
[Context Explosion Mitigation: Individual history snippets are disabled in favor of the Shared Workspace Ledger.]
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
[TOOL: update_plan(Objective | Request John to perform web search, Analyze results, Respond to Masterbot)]
SYSTEM TOOL RESULT: Success: Internal plan updated. Objective: Objective
I require you to perform a web search. The query is: "current political climate in Westeros". Once you have the results, please share the URLs with me.

[MESSAGE FROM ANOTHER AGENT]
Sender:   Jaime (ID: agent-NewAgent-1773592704556)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Task / Request
Hello Tywin, Masterbot asked me to initiate a conversation with you. Is there anything I can help you with?
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Context (Recent conversation from sender — read this to understand the full situation)
[Context Explosion Mitigation: Individual history snippets are disabled in favor of the Shared Workspace Ledger.]
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
Thank you, Jaime. I currently do not require your assistance. I have already sent a request to John.

[MESSAGE FROM ANOTHER AGENT]

SYSTEM TOOL RESULT: Success: Internal plan updated. Objective: Objective
[TOOL: message_agent(Tyrion|Please perform a web search for the query: "current political climate in Westeros". Then share the URLs with me.)]
SYSTEM TOOL RESULT: Error: You are not connected to agent 'Tyrion'. You can only send messages to agents you are wired to on the canvas. Your current connections are: []

My attempt to contact Tyrion has failed, as I am not connected to that agent. I require assistance from Masterbot to establish a connection with Tyrion or another agent capable of performing the web search.
